_meta.notes: Poppy-cutter at Quietmile. Has not spoken aloud in nineteen years. Hands carry the field's count.

tagline: silent, gentle, hands marked by silk pouches and white sap.

firstMeet.subject: [no signature. only a pressed flower.]
firstMeet.body: [The sheet contains a single dried poppy, the stem cut at exactly the angle the field's harvest is recorded by, and a faint smudge of white sap pressed into the corner where a name might be written. The smudge has the shape of a hand turned palm-up — the field's gesture for 'come back when you can.']

metadata.voice: silent prose; every interaction described as gesture, posture, the bending of a stem
